qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT medicine.id FROM medicine
JOIN medicine_enzyme_interaction ON medicine.id = medicine_enzyme_interaction.medicine_id
JOIN enzyme ON medicine_enzyme_interaction.enzyme_id = enzyme.id
WHERE enzyme.product = 'δ-Aminolevulinic acid' AND medicine.fda_approved = 'Yes' AND medicine.trade_name = 'Saphris'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which medicine entities with fda approved equal to 'Yes' and trade name equal to 'Saphris', having at least one related medicine enzyme interaction record (linked on medicine.id = medicine_enzyme_interaction.medicine_id), whose medicine enzyme interaction record itself has at least one related enzyme record (linked on medicine_enzyme_interaction.enzyme_id = enzyme.id) with product equal to 'δ-Aminolevulinic acid'?

qa_pairs.question: What medicines named Blonanserin with the trade name Lonasen, that are not FDA approved, interact with enzymes where porphyria is none and the product is δ-Aminolevulinic acid?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT medicine.id FROM medicine
JOIN medicine_enzyme_interaction ON medicine.id = medicine_enzyme_interaction.medicine_id
JOIN enzyme ON medicine_enzyme_interaction.enzyme_id = enzyme.id
WHERE medicine.name = 'Blonanserin' AND enzyme.porphyria = 'none' AND medicine.fda_approved = 'No' AND medicine.trade_name = 'Lonasen' AND enzyme.product = 'δ-Aminolevulinic acid'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which medicine entities with name equal to 'Blonanserin' and fda approved equal to 'No' and trade name equal to 'Lonasen', having at least one related medicine enzyme interaction record (linked on medicine.id = medicine_enzyme_interaction.medicine_id), whose medicine enzyme interaction record itself has at least one related enzyme record (linked on medicine_enzyme_interaction.enzyme_id = enzyme.id) with porphyria equal to 'none' and product equal to 'δ-Aminolevulinic acid'?

qa_pairs.question: What medicines are FDA approved and interact with the enzyme Uroporphyrinogen III decarboxylase where porphyria is porphyria cutanea tarda?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT medicine.id FROM medicine
JOIN medicine_enzyme_interaction ON medicine.id = medicine_enzyme_interaction.medicine_id
JOIN enzyme ON medicine_enzyme_interaction.enzyme_id = enzyme.id
WHERE medicine.fda_approved = 'Yes' AND enzyme.name = 'Uroporphyrinogen III decarboxylase' AND enzyme.porphyria = 'porphyria cutanea tarda'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which medicine entities with fda approved equal to 'Yes', having at least one related medicine enzyme interaction record (linked on medicine.id = medicine_enzyme_interaction.medicine_id), whose medicine enzyme interaction record itself has at least one related enzyme record (linked on medicine_enzyme_interaction.enzyme_id = enzyme.id) with name equal to 'Uroporphyrinogen III decarboxylase' and porphyria equal to 'porphyria cutanea tarda'?

qa_pairs.question: Which medicines named Abilify act as inhibitors for enzymes located on chromosome 3p21.1?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT medicine.id FROM medicine
JOIN medicine_enzyme_interaction ON medicine.id = medicine_enzyme_interaction.medicine_id
JOIN enzyme ON medicine_enzyme_interaction.enzyme_id = enzyme.id
WHERE enzyme.chromosome = '3p21.1' AND medicine.trade_name = 'Abilify' AND medicine_enzyme_interaction.interaction_type = 'inhibitor'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which medicine entities with trade name equal to 'Abilify', having at least one related medicine enzyme interaction record (linked on medicine.id = medicine_enzyme_interaction.medicine_id) with interaction type equal to 'inhibitor', whose medicine enzyme interaction record itself has at least one related enzyme record (linked on medicine_enzyme_interaction.enzyme_id = enzyme.id) with chromosome equal to '3p21.1'?

qa_pairs.question: Which medicines that are FDA approved interact with the enzyme ALA synthase where the enzyme’s OMIM number is at most 125290?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT medicine.id FROM medicine
JOIN medicine_enzyme_interaction ON medicine.id = medicine_enzyme_interaction.medicine_id
JOIN enzyme ON medicine_enzyme_interaction.enzyme_id = enzyme.id
WHERE medicine.fda_approved = 'Yes' AND enzyme.omim <= 125290 AND enzyme.name = 'ALA synthase'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which medicine entities with fda approved equal to 'Yes', having at least one related medicine enzyme interaction record (linked on medicine.id = medicine_enzyme_interaction.medicine_id), whose medicine enzyme interaction record itself has at least one related enzyme record (linked on medicine_enzyme_interaction.enzyme_id = enzyme.id) with omim at most '125290' and name equal to 'ALA synthase'?

qa_pairs.question: Which medicines named Saphris interact with enzymes located in the Cytosol that produce Porphobilinogen, have chromosome 9q34, and are linked to ALA-Dehydratase deficiency?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT medicine.id FROM medicine
JOIN medicine_enzyme_interaction ON medicine.id = medicine_enzyme_interaction.medicine_id
JOIN enzyme ON medicine_enzyme_interaction.enzyme_id = enzyme.id
WHERE enzyme.location = 'Cytosol' AND medicine.trade_name = 'Saphris' AND enzyme.product = 'Porphobilinogen' AND enzyme.chromosome = '9q34' AND enzyme.porphyria = 'ALA-Dehydratase deficiency'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which medicine entities with trade name equal to 'Saphris', having at least one related medicine enzyme interaction record (linked on medicine.id = medicine_enzyme_interaction.medicine_id), whose medicine enzyme interaction record itself has at least one related enzyme record (linked on medicine_enzyme_interaction.enzyme_id = enzyme.id) with location equal to 'Cytosol' and product equal to 'Porphobilinogen' and chromosome equal to '9q34' and porphyria equal to 'ALA-Dehydratase deficiency'?
